pr.title: feat(discover): import and wire 28-33m ABI CSVs into gateway
pr.rollback: Revert this PR, then remove 28-30m and 31-33m rows from gateway mapping tables if immediate DB rollback is required.

receipt.goal: Import ABI_28_30m_ready.csv and ABI_31_33m_ready.csv through the real Discover gateway ingestion path and wire Discover to unlock Stage 1+2 with Stage 3 empty-state handling.
commands_run: git commit -m "feat(discover): import ABI 28-33m and wire stage fallback"
git commit -m "fix(sql): dedupe ABI upserts to avoid ON CONFLICT double-hit"
verification_steps: Stage 3 product fields are blank in both source CSVs (nonblank count: 0)
Migration is idempotent and only touches existing canonical gateway tables used by Discover reads
Migration fix added: deduplicate payloads by conflict keys before upserts to prevent ON CONFLICT double-hit error (21000)
Discover now treats Stage 1+2 presence as unlock condition while Stage 3 empty state renders 'Examples coming soon'
rollback_plan: delete 28-30m and 31-33m rows from pl_age_band_category_type_products, pl_age_band_development_need_category_types, pl_age_band_development_need_meta, and pl_age_band_ux_wrappers if DB rollback is required
optionally delete pl_age_bands rows 28-30m and 31-33m after confirming no dependencies
